race_meta.race_name: Read Meg Nicholls' Blog At betmgm.co.uk Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked zipwire at position 5 with only 13.0% probability. Top pick was Berkshire Schmokin (28.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Berkshire Schmokin > Aneirin's Sword, but actual result was Zipwire > Aneirin's Sword. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Zipwire showed significant positive divergence (+5.9): Model valued at 13.0% vs Market 7.1%. Identified genuine market inefficiency.
